lines: Naomi keeps both hands on the sewing cloth.
"You can ask. Do not reach while you do it."

choices.label: Ask permission to look at her nails
Ask about the seam she is mending

lines: Dark ridges sit beneath clean nail beds, ending before the first joints.
"They changed when I was twelve. Teaching other people when to stop took longer."
Naomi turns the hem so the hidden stitch faces you. "A door curtain. Strong enough to move every day, plain enough that inspectors forget it."
